motivation: Persist the New note action through the existing backend create endpoint so newly created notes survive refresh before edit/save work lands.

included: ui/src/services/notes.ts: add a typed POST /notes/ createNote client using the existing request() helper
ui/src/features/notes/useNotes.ts: expose a createNote operation that maps the returned NoteDTO into NoteMock and prepends it to the shared notes ref
ui/src/features/shell/AppShell.vue: wire the sidebar New button to the persisted create operation, select the returned note, and keep the existing transition into edit mode
tests for the service client, useNotes create behavior, and AppShell New button behavior
excluded: real edit/save UI and PUT /notes/{note_id}; planned in note-edit-save-workflow
visible tag editing, tag creation controls, bulk tag management, tag colors, or tag ordering
autosave, offline draft recovery, conflict resolution, and SSE/live refresh integration
backend API changes; POST /api/notes/ already exists

design_facts.stack: Vue 3 (<script setup> SFCs) + TypeScript + Vite frontend with ofetch services and module-singleton composables; FastAPI backend already exposes POST /api/notes/ returning NoteResponse.

work_items.title: Persist New note action
work_items.design_reference: app shell sidebar New button and active note pane

component_map.notes: Keep the current New button and PlusIcon; change the AppShell handler behind the existing newNote event.
Use the returned NoteResponse to select the newly persisted note and keep the current mode transition.

icon_map.notes: Already used by SidebarDrawer; no icon change.

consumes.request: CreateNoteRequest with content: string, optional title?: string | null, optional tags?: string[] | null.
consumes.response: NoteDTO matching backend NoteResponse: id, title, content, tags, createdAt, updatedAt.

exposes.service: createNote(payload): Promise<NoteDTO> in ui/src/services/notes.ts. It uses request<NoteDTO>("/notes/", { method: "POST", body: payload }) and relies on http.ts for auth and one refresh retry.
exposes.composable: useNotes() returns createNote(payload?: Partial<CreateNoteRequest>): Promise<NoteMock>. The default payload creates '# Untitled\n\n' with no tags. The returned DTO is mapped through the same DTO-to-NoteMock adapter used by fetchNotes().
exposes.ui: Clicking SidebarDrawer's New button calls the persisted create operation, prepends/selects the returned note, clears settings/nav state, closes the mobile drawer, and sets mode to 'edit' to preserve the current entry flow for the later edit binder.

states.pending: The New action should not create duplicate notes while a create request is already pending. A simple creating flag is enough; no spinner redesign is required.
states.error: On create failure, leave notes and activeId unchanged and expose a visible error in the shell/sidebar using the existing error styling pattern or a narrowly scoped action error. Do not add a toast system.
states.success: The selected note is the backend-returned note. Timestamps and tags come from the response, not from Date.now() local fabrication.

signals: contract-mutation:new frontend service/composable write operation over an existing backend endpoint
capability-escalation:new persisted write IO from the New button
blast-radius:AppShell owns activeId, mode, sidebar state, notes list, and settings state

assertions: createNote() in services/notes.ts POSTs to /api/notes/ with the supplied body and returns the NoteDTO response unchanged.
useNotes().createNote() maps the returned NoteDTO to NoteMock, prepends it to notes, and preserves backend id, timestamps, content, and tags.
The AppShell New button does not fabricate a local id or Date.now timestamps; it selects the backend-created note after the POST resolves.
A failed create request leaves the current note list and active selection unchanged and surfaces an error.
Existing note listing, tag filtering, markdown rendering, copy/export, settings, theme, and read/edit mode tests still pass.
oracle.command: make test-ui-lint && cd ui && npm run test -- src/services/notes.test.ts src/features/notes/useNotes.test.ts src/features/shell/__tests__/AppShell.test.ts
